title: Drodi's Arsenal
description: My overhaul of Minecraft's tools and armor.
body:
**Drodi's Arsenal** is my personal take on improving Vanilla armor. This pack gives most armors a unique redesign, making them more distinct from one another. Additionally, some tools have been retextured for a fresh look.

This pack is still work in progress and many things are subject to change, but the currently updated armor are:
- Leather, 
- Iron, 
- Gold,
- Diamond,
- Netherite



<details>
<summary>Official Sources:</summary>
The only official versions of my resource packs are available on:

> Curseforge: [**Dordinatteur**](https://www.curseforge.com/members/dordinatteur/projects)
> 
> Modrinth: [**Drodi**](https://modrinth.com/user/Drodi)
> 
> Planet Minecraft: [**Drodi**](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/drodi/)

Any other website may host unauthorized reuploads, which could contain viruses or malware. If you choose to download from unofficial sources, you do so at your own risk.

If you suspect that someone is reuploading my resource packs without permission and action can be taken, please contact me on Discord: drodi99.

</details>
  
<details>
<summary>Credits:</summary>

- [**Reijvi**](https://modrinth.com/user/Reijvi) : Various color palettes and armor item sprites from versions v1 and v1.1 
- [**Frootloopgoop**](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/frootloopgoop/) : Armor inspiration and general feedback.
